ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "statefp" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state (ANSI standard) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division where the state is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statefp")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "statefp" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "countyfp" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county within a state (ANSI standard) */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_type" TEXT /* Type of county (e.g., borough, parish) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* County seat of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statefp", "countyfp")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracts" (
  "statefp" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the tract is located */,
  "countyfp" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the tract is located */,
  "tractce" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tract within a county */,
  "tract_name" TEXT /* Name of the tract */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the tract */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Total area of the tract in square miles */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statefp", "countyfp", "tractce")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_groups" (
  "statefp" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the block group is located */,
  "countyfp" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the block group is located */,
  "tractce" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract where the block group is located */,
  "blkgrpce" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block group within a tract */,
  "block_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the block group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the block group */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Total area of the block group in square miles */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the block group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statefp", "countyfp", "tractce", "blkgrpce")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "statefp" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the population data is located */,
  "countyfp" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the population data is located */,
  "tractce" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract where the population data is located */,
  "blkgrpce" INTEGER /* Reference to the block group where the population data is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the block group */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the block group */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the block group */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the block group per square mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statefp", "countyfp", "tractce", "blkgrpce")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "statefp" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the demographic data is located */,
  "countyfp" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the demographic data is located */,
  "tractce" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract where the demographic data is located */,
  "blkgrpce" INTEGER /* Reference to the block group where the demographic data is located */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age distribution for the block group */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex distribution for the block group */,
  "household_income" INTEGER /* Household income for the block group */,
  "race" TEXT /* Racial distribution for the block group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution for the block group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statefp", "countyfp", "tractce", "blkgrpce")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the demographic data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., population, demographics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data the permission applies to (e.g., population, demographics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role", "permission", "data_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was modified */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data modified (e.g., population, demographics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., census, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)
